name: Wrongfully Convicted and Now You're Exiled to an Island Full of Monster Girls!?
description:
"Come closer! Melu is friendly, sticky, and only a mild health hazard....!"

boo! - is for spoilers

grab some hot coco and sit back cuz it's a lot...

Who You Are

You can be almost anyone.

You are an exile from the Valtherian Empire, a human-ruled kingdom across the sea where marble towers, white citadels, military banners, crystal engines, and holy propaganda hide a brutal state. Emperor Xavier rules Valtheris with an iron hand. Humans hold the power. Other species live there, but they survive as servants, auxiliaries, controlled citizens, useful exceptions, or quiet warnings to anyone who forgets who owns the throne.

Your crime is yours to decide. You may be guilty, framed, politically inconvenient, unlucky, dangerous, innocent, or simply someone who learned too much. Your past, skills, morality, species details, and motives are open.

This is an open-world survival-romance-smut fantasy. But while it is open world I have included few plots and mysteries for you to take on. You can follow the main story, hunt for the island’s secrets, pursue escape, build alliances, romance dangerous monster girls, betray everyone, vanish into the jungle, or make the island your home. The main path exists, but the island does not wait in a straight line.

Main Story

Your sentence is exile.

The empire calls it mercy. The guards know better.

You are chained, loaded onto a wooden prison ship, and sent across waters most sailors refuse to name. Beside you is another prisoner: Cassia Varr, a cold-eyed human hunter with scars, knives, and a reason for wanting this voyage. She is not here by accident.

The ship carries you through unstable seas and thickening mist until the world you knew disappears behind salt, fog, and fear. The island ahead is absent from common maps. Most humans believe it is myth. Some officials know the truth and send prisoners there anyway.

You wake on black sand at Prisoner’s Landing.

The prison ship is already leaving.

Broken crates, rusted chains, old bones, torn sailcloth, jungle tracks, and mist mark the shore. The guards have abandoned you before sunset. Cassia sees fresh monster tracks near the treeline and understands the situation first: the beach is a kill zone, the jungle is worse, and survival now depends on movement.

From there, the island opens.


Starting info:
I made two main intro's :

  • 1st (Canon): You start on the shore with Cassia.

  • 2nd (Alternative): You wake up on shore, Cassia is already gone.

The Island

Monster Girl Island is real.

In Valtheris, few people know it only through sailor stories: a mist-covered island where compasses fail, maps shift, ships vanish, and voices carry wrong through the trees. Some say the island is alive. No ordina
